notes: Games got a big upgrade! Games now has its own tab, and every game feels alive: dice tumble to their result, Connect Four discs drop in, 2048 tiles slide and merge, cards flip in 3D. Basketball has a real hoop — swipe up to shoot a spinning arc. 2048 is swipe-controlled too. New game: Penalty Kicks vs a keeper. Dice and Rock-Paper-Scissors dropped their levels (they're pure luck). More coming: head-to-head timed battles in group chats.
